chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-903 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.4284/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 21.04.2021 Mr. Muhammad Hashim Bajeer, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along- with Rajesh Kumar Assistant Commissioner Taluka Mithi and Survey Superintendent Mirpurkhas Division. Mr. Munawar-uz-Zaman Juna, Advocate for the respondent No.3. == Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh contends that per comments of the official respondent No.7 that the alleged entries in favour of the petitioner are fake and forged. Learned counsel after arguing the matter at some length contends that he has already made an appeal before the competent Authority which is pending for adjudication, therefore, does not press this petition; however, requests that said appeal may be decided in accordance with law. In the given circumstances, present petition is dismissed as not pressed; however, directions are given to the competent Authority (Member Judicial-I Board of Revenue) where petitioner’s revenue appeal is pending to decide the said appeal strictly in accordance with law preferably within thirty days after receipt of this order. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish Steno*
